title: This lifetime cloud storage deal gives you 6TB for life for just $250
excerpt: Stop renting cloud storage and own it instead.
content_html:
TL;DR: Own your cloud storage outright with this 6TB lifetime subscription to Drime Secure Cloud Storage, now for just $249.99 (reg. $599).

Credit: Drime

$199.97
$599 Save $399.03

Sick of scrolling through your photos and trying to decide what to delete? Drime Secure Cloud Storage gives you a permanent spot to store your files, and you only pay once to keep them there for life.

Right now, you can lock down 6TB of storage for just $249.99.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

We own our laptops, our smartphones, and our tablets… so why isn’t there an option to own our cloud storage? Drime Secure Cloud Storage makes that possible, and this deal lets you pay once to secure 6TB of space for life.

Drime Secure Cloud Storage isn’t just more affordable than the competitors; it’s also safer. Your data is protected with end-to-end encryption. Drime is also a Europe-based, GDPR-compliant company, which means your data is hosted in Europe and never routed through the United States.

An easy-to-use interface makes it easy to upload, sync, and share files from different devices. You don’t have any upload limit — save any content to your storage space, no matter how big it is. And there are convenient ways to organize and manage your files, clients, and projects within Drime’s workspaces.

This lifetime subscription gives you 6TB of storage, plus helpful features like automatic device sync and password-protected link sharing if you’re using your storage for private or professional purposes.

Mashable Deals

By signing up, you agree to receive recurring automated SMS marketing messages from Mashable Deals at the number provided. Msg and data rates may apply. Up to 2 messages/day. Reply STOP to opt out, HELP for help. Consent is not a condition of purchase. See our Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

Lock in this 6TB lifetime subscription to Drime Secure Cloud Storage for only $249.99.

StackSocial prices subject to change.

content_html_zh:
TL;DR：通过 Drime Secure Cloud Storage 的 6TB 终身订阅，完全拥有您的云存储，现仅需 249.99 美元（原价 599 美元）。

图片来源：德莱姆

$199.97
$599 Save $399.03

厌倦了滚动浏览照片并尝试决定删除哪些内容？ Drime 安全云存储为您提供了一个永久的位置来存储您的文件，您只需支付一次即可将它们终身保留。

现在，您只需 249.99 美元即可锁定 6TB 存储空间。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

我们拥有笔记本电脑、智能手机和平板电脑…… 那么为什么没有选择拥有我们的云存储呢？ Drime 安全云存储使这一切成为可能，这项交易让您只需支付一次即可终身获得 6TB 的空间。

Drime 安全云存储不仅比竞争对手更实惠，而且价格实惠。它也更安全。 您的数据受到端到端加密的保护。 Drime 也是一家总部位于欧洲、符合 GDPR 的公司，这意味着您的数据托管在欧洲，并且绝不会经过美国。

易于使用的界面使您可以轻松地从不同设备上传、同步和共享文件。 您没有任何上传限制 - 将任何内容保存到您的存储空间，无论它有多大。 在 Drime 工作区中，您可以通过便捷的方式组织和管理文件、客户和项目。

此终身订阅为您提供 6TB 的存储空间，如果您将存储空间用于私人或专业用途，还可享受自动设备同步和受密码保护的链接共享等有用功能。

混搭优惠

注册即表示您同意按照提供的号码接收来自 Mashable Deals 的定期自动 SMS 营销消息。 消息和数据速率可能适用。 每天最多 2 条消息。 回复 STOP 可选择退出，回复 HELP 寻求帮助。 同意不是购买的条件。 请参阅我们的隐私政策和使用条款。

只需 249.99 美元即可锁定 Drime 安全云存储的 6TB 终身订阅。

StackSocial 价格可能会发生变化。
